title: Tesla sold 25% more cars and made 57% less operating profit. The AI spending is the reason.
summary: Tesla’s Q2 revenue hit $28.24B (+26%) with record 480,126 deliveries. Tesla delivered 480,126 vehicles in the second quarter, its highest-ever quarterly total, and generated record revenue of $28.24 billion, up 26% year-on-year.
caption: output/2026-07-23/tesla-sold-25-more-cars-and-made-57-less-operating-profit-the-ai-spend.txt
